summary: Tested Deposit Offers (Einzahlungs-Angebote) feature integration into BidBlitzPay wallet. All features working correctly: Bonus tab visible and clickable, DepositOffers component renders with 4 offers (5%, 10%, 15%, 20% bonus), calculator computes bonus/interest/total correctly, German translations displayed.

bonus_tab_navigation.details: Bonus tab visible in wallet navigation tabs, clickable, renders DepositOffers component

deposit_offers_component.details: Component renders with data-testid='deposit-offers', shows title 'Einzahlungs-Angebote'

calculator_functionality.details: Calculator appears when offer selected, correctly computes: bonus (€20 for 10% on €200), estimated interest (€0.99 for 3% p.a. over 60 days), total (€220.99)

verified_translations: Gesamt nach X Tage (total after X days)

steps: 1. Angebot wählen - Je höher die Einzahlung, desto mehr Bonus & Zinsen
2. Bonus sofort - Bonus wird direkt Ihrem Guthaben gutgeschrieben
3. Zinsen sammeln - Täglich wachsende Zinsen bis zu 5% p.a.
4. Auszahlung - Nach der Laufzeit Zinsen abheben

context_for_next_testing_agent: Deposit Offers feature is fully integrated into BidBlitzPay wallet. The Bonus tab in navigation renders the DepositOffers component. Backend API at /api/deposit-offers/offers returns 4 offers with correct bonus percentages (5%, 10%, 15%, 20%) and interest rates (2%, 3%, 4%, 5% p.a.). Calculator correctly computes returns. All German translations are working.
